decisions.decision: Handle stage2 Sentences_Oare column structure (first_word_spelling, translation) separately from stage1/3 (transliteration, translation)
decisions.rationale: Stage2 CSV lacks transliteration column; loader and integrity checks map first_word_spelling to normalized transliteration

decisions.decision: Use ASCII markers ([OK]/[ERROR]) for integrity CLI output instead of Unicode
decisions.rationale: Windows console encoding (cp1252) fails on Unicode checkmarks

next_action: Start Plan 03-02 Task 1: create tests/phase3/test_batch_collation.py per plan, then run RED phase tests
